positive: A highly detailed, stylized symmetrical mandal abstract design featuring bioluminescent deep-sea flora and celestial cosmic elements. The central composition should depict swirling nebulae and geometric sea-life forms, such as glowing jellyfish and intricate coral structures. Use a vibrant color palette dominated by electric blues, deep purples, teal, and pops of neon magenta. The style should blend psychedelic art, Art Nouveau fluidity, and technical engraving precision. Ensure strong contrast between the glowing subjects and the dark, velvety background. Clean silhouettes, symmetry, central focus, high depth of field, perfect print resolution, vector illustration quality.
negative: blur, artifacts, grainy, smudge, text, watermark, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor composition, logo, brand, signature
